title: Traditional British Trifle
description: A classic English dessert consisting of layers of sponge cake, fruit, custard, and whipped cream.
instructions: Soak the sponge cake cubes in the fruit juices for about 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the soaked sponge cake cubes and fruit.
Pour the custard over the cake mixture and mix gently.
Spoon the trifle into individual serving dishes or one large serving dish.
Top with whipped cream and a sprinkle of vanilla extract.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional fruit if desired.
